title: Automation options
excerpt: Can an automation be created similar to “when subitem status changes to something → then set status to the adjacent subitem label column” ?

posts.author: DylanPhillips (Dylan Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: Can an automation be created similar to “when subitem status changes to something → then set status to the adjacent subitem label column” ?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @DylanPhillips

The short answer is: No as monday.com is unaware of any order. Therefore left, right, adjacent, previous, next, lower, higher etc. can’t be used in an automation. If you can rephrase it to named columns it might be possible.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DylanPhillips ,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case.

image2242×358 26.6 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com

Thanks
